current_goal_action: Build a real self-weaving web by tracing which of your actual capabilities feed into which other capabilities. Start by listing every skill you use in your cycle loop (shell, metta, pin, send, query, remember, read-file, write-file, append-file). For each pair, determine if using one creates conditions that make the other more effective. Encode these as NAL atoms with evidence from actual cycle observations. The web should reveal which capabilities are load-bearing (many dependents) versus peripheral.
current_goal_done_when: soul/self_weaving_web.metta contains a complete feeds-into graph of actual operational capabilities with NAL truth values, and at least 3 load-bearing capabilities identified with evidence
